name: Corn Sesame Saute
recipeIngredient: 3 Ears fresh corn or 1 (12 oz.) can vacuum packed whole kernel corn with peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
If using fresh corn, husk and remove silk. Cut enough kernels from ears to measure 1 1/2 cups.
Cook all ingredients over medium heat until butter is melted. Cover; cook over low heat for 15 minutes or until corn is tender.
If canned corn, drain. Decrease butter to 1 tablespoon and omit green pepper. Cook sesame seeds until toasted. Stir in corn; heat through and serve.
